_schema.condition_order: List of 3 condition names in their presentation order (after RS1 and before RS2).
_schema.audio_sync: Time of the AUDIO_SYNC reference in the raw audio file. Accepts 'mm:ss', 'h:mm:ss', or seconds.
_schema.trigger_patches: Optional manual fixes applied AFTER trigger detection. Supported keys: remove_indices (list of negative ints, applied as condition_indices.pop(i)), add_after_last_s (float, appends a trigger this many seconds after the last detected one, sample-rate computed from sampling_rate).
_schema.sampling_rate: Sample rate (Hz) used to translate add_after_last_s into samples and to set time_s when missing. Default 256.

sub-00.notes: Raw EEG/physio split into multiple HH-MM-SS sub-folders with vendor BBT format; current load_data() only reads CSV root. Needs a dedicated multi-block loader before it can run.

sub-01.notes: Same multi-block raw layout as sub-00.

sub-04.notes: Last condition trigger missing in recording; injected 3 min after last detected trigger.

sub-05.notes: Spurious extra trigger near end; remove the 5th-from-last index.

sub-07.notes: Raw data present (single-block CSV layout) but not yet validated end-to-end.

sub-08.notes: Lowered trigger threshold (1950 instead of 2000); some trigger anomalies may remain. Run manually with --subjects 08 once validated.
